pipeline_assumptions.A1: machine_name <-> ip_address forms an exact 1-to-1 mapping across all tables (0% drift).
pipeline_assumptions.A2: Monitoring occurs on a regular 4-hour cycle (6 slots/day, 186 total slots per machine).
pipeline_assumptions.A3: Inter-system clock jitter up to 46 minutes exists; raw timestamps are bucketized into monitoring_slots.
pipeline_assumptions.A4: Ping Status forms the complete master inventory (246 assets; other files are strict subsets).
pipeline_assumptions.A5: A physical server is either HPE or Dell, never both; vendor telemetry is preserved separately without coalescing.
